message:
feat(demo): add mouse + keyboard shortcuts to Command Palette Lab, Layout Lab, Responsive Demo

Add mouse click/scroll/right-click interactions and keybinding hints to
three demo screens (bd-iuvb.17.11.7, bd-iuvb.17.9.2, bd-iuvb.17.9.4):

Command Palette Lab: click to execute selected, scroll to navigate results
(3 items per tick via synthetic key events).

Layout Lab: click preview to toggle debug, click controls to toggle direction,
right-click preview to cycle preset, scroll to adjust gap/alignment.

Responsive Demo: click breakpoint indicator to toggle custom breakpoints,
right-click to reset defaults, scroll to adjust simulated width.

Each screen stores Cell<Rect> layout areas for mouse hit-testing,
adds handle_mouse() method, and includes 5 mouse interaction tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
